tasks.subject: Task 1: Schema — Add show_in_dm_sidebar to channel_members
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the `show_in_dm_sidebar` boolean column to `im_channel_members`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/im/channel-members.ts`
- Create: Migration file via `pnpm db:generate`

**Verify:** `pnpm db:push` succeeds; `pnpm build:server` compiles

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/libs/database/src/schemas/im/channel-members.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build:server", "acceptanceCriteria": ["show_in_dm_sidebar column exists with default true", "ChannelMember types include new field"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Backend — Expose showInDmSidebar in getUserChannels
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Include `showInDmSidebar` in channel response for DM/echo channels.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.spec.ts`

**Verify:** `npx jest --testPathPattern channels.service.spec` passes

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/server && npx jest --testPathPattern channels.service.spec --passWithNoTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ChannelWithUnread includes showInDmSidebar", "getUserChannels returns the field"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Backend — Add sidebar visibility API endpoint
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create PATCH /v1/im/channels/:id/sidebar-visibility endpoint.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.controller.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.controller.spec.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.spec.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps/server && npx jest --testPathPattern "channels\.(service|controller)\.spec"` passes

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/im/channels/channels.controller.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/server && npx jest --testPathPattern channels --passWithNoTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PATCH endpoint updates showInDmSidebar", "Returns 400 for non-DM channels", "Only updates current user record"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: IM Worker — Auto-unhide on new message
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Auto-set showInDmSidebar=true for DM/echo channels on new message.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/im-worker/src/message/message.service.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/im-worker/src/message/message.service.spec.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps/server && npx jest --testPathPattern "im-worker.*message.service.spec"` passes

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/im-worker/src/message/message.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/im-worker/src/message/message.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/server && npx jest --testPathPattern message.service.spec --passWithNoTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["DM channels: showInDmSidebar set to true on message", "Non-DM channels: no update"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Backend — Conditional batch DM creation on workspace join
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Skip batch DM creation for workspaces with 10+ members.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/workspace/workspace.service.ts`
- Modify: `apps/server/apps/gateway/src/workspace/workspace.service.spec.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps/server && npx jest --testPathPattern workspace.service.spec` passes

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/server/apps/gateway/src/workspace/workspace.service.ts", "apps/server/apps/gateway/src/workspace/workspace.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps/server && npx jest --testPathPattern workspace.service.spec --passWithNoTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["<10 members: batch DM creation runs", ">=10 members: batch DM creation skipped"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Frontend — Update types and API client
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add showInDmSidebar to frontend types, API, and mutation hook.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/client/src/types/im.ts`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/services/api/im.ts`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/hooks/useChannels.ts`

**Verify:** `pnpm build:client` succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/types/im.ts", "apps/client/src/services/api/im.ts", "apps/client/src/hooks/useChannels.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build:client", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ChannelWithUnread includes showInDmSidebar", "setSidebarVisibility API function exists", "useSetSidebarVisibility hook with optimistic update"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Frontend — Right-click context menu and sidebar filtering
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add right-click hide menu and filter hidden channels.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/client/src/components/layout/sidebars/MessagesSubSidebar.tsx`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/hooks/useChannels.ts`
- Modify: all i18n locale files

**Verify:** `pnpm build:client` succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/components/layout/sidebars/MessagesSubSidebar.tsx", "apps/client/src/hooks/useChannels.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build:client", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Right-click shows Hide Conversation", "Hidden channels filtered from sidebar", "i18n keys for all locales"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Frontend — Auto-unhide on WebSocket new message
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Flip showInDmSidebar to true in cache on new_message event.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/client/src/hooks/useWebSocketEvents.ts`

**Verify:** `pnpm build:client` succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/hooks/useWebSocketEvents.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build:client", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Hidden DM channels reappear on new message", "Existing unread count logic preserved"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Frontend — Unhide on search/open conversation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Unhide hidden DM when user opens conversation via search or member click.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps/client/src/hooks/useChannels.ts`
- Modify: `apps/client/src/components/layout/sidebars/MessagesSubSidebar.tsx`

**Verify:** `pnpm build:client` succeeds

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps/client/src/hooks/useChannels.ts", "apps/client/src/components/layout/sidebars/MessagesSubSidebar.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm build:client", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Clicking member with hidden DM unhides it", "New DM creation defaults to visible"]}
```
